title: Fierros' World
description: A Minecraft mod which adds new overpowered bosses, dimensions, structures, weapons and other features.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74d2b8b47e335ec67b32fb89aafae3bd8cac1681.png)

Fierro's World is inspired on a manhua known as Tales of Demons and Gods. This mod adds/will add mechanics, mobs, bosses, weapons, tools, dimensions, structures and more. The mod base is inspired in the manhua, but it will also have original content and features from other midia.

By now, most features aren't avaliable on survival or have any sound. You can test and familiarize yourself with the mod, but don't add it to your already made worlds, as some capabilities might be edited/added, which could break playerdata and make the world unplayable.

# Basic Mechanics
**Soul Force**
Soul Force is the core of your power. It is needed to use Beast Form, Beast Skills and Weapon Skills, granting supernatural strength to the player. It also determines your rank as a Spiritualist.
<details>
<summary>Soul Force HUD</summary>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eec7e744e4948a092e70b636582529c6a41b0cc3.png)

</details>

================================================================================
 
**Cultivation**
To increase your Soul Force, you must use Cultivation Scrolls, which gradually expand your Soul Realm over time. Additionally, you can speed up this process with Cultivation Potions, allowing for faster and more efficient growth.
<details>
<summary>Cultivation Scroll</summary>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d896a1cb6da7522cb72fcc11216d40e852609af9_0.webp)

</details>

================================================================================

**Physical**
The Physical attribute determines the amount of damage you deal and take, while also increasing your maximum health.
You have a 10% chance to gain Physical Points by dealing or receiving damage (A fraction of the value).
- Dealing damage grants extra Physical points, making your attacks stronger.
- Taking damage grants extra maximum health, making you more resilient.
<details>
<summary>Physical HUD</summary>
  
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6497a1dad2e9a20a9f0da50e7b69d2c066e44a7c.png)

</details>

================================================================================

**Beast Form**
Every mob and boss from the mod drops it spirit on death. Players are able to fuse the spirit with his own Soul Realm during Cultivation, unlocking the respective Beast Form on Combat Mode ("Z" key). Minecraft bosses also drops their spirit.
<details>
<summary>Wither Beast Form</summary>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31c705b36c6700c42cdc8875c1e3ae0fc05bf10f_0.webp)

</details>
